title: cyrtochloa toppingii
intro: Cyrtochloa toppingii, also known as Toping's grass or grass of life, is a species of grass native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Cyrtochloa toppingii include its ability to speed up wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, among others. Cyrtochloa toppingii is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, or used in traditional folk medicine as a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
